message:
feat(patterns): Gemini usage warning, session resume hints, workflow regression tests

- patterns.rs: add gemini.usage.warning rule for approaching-limit
  detection, expand gemini.usage.reached anchors for variant phrasings,
  enrich gemini.session.summary regex to capture tokens_used/input/output,
  add gemini.session.resume_hint rule for session resume commands.
- workflows.rs: remove redundant null-trigger early-abort in
  HandleSessionEnd and HandleAuthRequired (trigger data is always
  present by contract), add has_trigger tracing field. Add 500+ lines
  of workflow regression tests covering session-end selection for
  codex/claude/gemini summaries and session-end events.
- builtin.json: updated test fixture with new pattern definitions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
